quality.description_clarity: High. The mechanical effects (difficult terrain, restraining save, escape action) are clearly defined.
quality.formatting_notes: The use of markdown links (e.g., '[restrained](#restrained)') is present in the raw data but should be normalized or accepted as part of the source format.
quality.completeness: Complete. Includes all standard spell attributes.

mechanics.primary_effect: Creates difficult terrain in a 20-foot square.
mechanics.secondary_effect: Restrains creatures failing a Strength save upon casting.
mechanics.escape_mechanism: Action to make a Strength check against Spell Save DC.

analysis.archival_recommendation: Approved. Data is consistent and mechanically sound.
